title: prepare stmt query return error record
vulnerable_version: mysql  Ver 8.0.27 for Linux on x86_64 (M, 8.0.27
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (c_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c_value VARCHAR(50), c_date DATE, c_flag BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (1, 'test value', '2023-01-01', TRUE);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (2, 'another value', NULL, FALSE);
UPDATE t3 SET c_value = 'updated value' WHERE c_id = 1;
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE c_date IS NULL OR c_flag = TRUE;
key_bug_features: prepare statements query with all operator returns incorrect results
